package rulecoverage

func NegativeManualRequiredChecksAfterValidateTagsAvailable() string {
    ruleID := "manual_required_checks_after_validate_tags_available"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handlers that re-check required fields manually even though struct-tag validation already exists."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
